CustomField.formula: IF(AND( NOT ISNULL(leaseworks__TaskCostMin__c), NOT ISNULL(leaseworks__Y_Hidden_TaskCostEvent__c )),Max( leaseworks__TaskCostMin__c, leaseworks__Y_Hidden_TaskCostEvent__c ), IF(AND( NOT ISNULL(leaseworks__TaskCostMin__c), ISNULL(leaseworks__Y_Hidden_TaskCostEvent__c )),leaseworks__TaskCostMin__c, IF(AND( ISNULL(leaseworks__TaskCostMin__c), NOT ISNULL(leaseworks__Y_Hidden_TaskCostEvent__c )),leaseworks__Y_Hidden_TaskCostEvent__c,Null)))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Maximum of Task cost or Event Cost %
CustomField.label: Task Cost Calculated
